ComponentType: Surface Mount Schottky Barrier Rectifier Diode
Description: The SS32LH through SS320LH are a series of 3A surface-mount Schottky barrier rectifier diodes designed for high-efficiency power conversion applications. They feature a low forward voltage drop, ultra-high-speed switching capability, and a low-profile DO-214AC (SMA) package to save board space. These diodes are suitable for use as rectifiers, freewheeling diodes, and polarity protection in circuits requiring high current capability and fast recovery.

KeyParameters.**Max Reverse Current (IR)**: 0.5 mA @ VRRM, TA=25°C / 20 mA @ VRRM, TA=100°C

Functions.FunctionDescription: Positive terminal for forward current flow.
Negative terminal, marked by a cathode band on the package body.
